ingredients_text: Bean thread 42% (potato starch, water, mung bean starch, salt, thickener : propylene glycol alginate), stewed vegetarian mushroom pack 48% (water, konjac starch, shiitake mushroom, carrot, onion, refined palm oil, _soya_ sauce, _sesame_, sugar, modified corn starch, flavor enhancer : monosodium glutamate, salt, _soya_ bean oil, chilli, pepper), soup base pack 8% (salt, maltodextrin, sugar, flavor enhancers (monosodium glutamate, E627, E631), _soya_ sauce powder, artificial mushroom flavor, pepper, dried _celery_, natural colour : E150a, anti-caking agent : silicon dioxide), dried vegetable pack 2% (cabbage, carrot, corn, _celery_)
